dropImage: Drop an image here or click to select
supportedFormats: Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, SVG
noSelection: Draw a selection on the image to crop
firstFrameOnly: Animated image — only the first frame is used
largeImage: Large image ({w}×{h}) — processing may be slow
formatNotSupported: This image format is not supported. Please use PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, or SVG.

descriptions.title: About Image Cropper
descriptions.aeoDefinition: Image Cropper is a free online tool for cropping images with free selection, preset aspect ratios, or exact pixel dimensions. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. All processing runs locally in your browser.
descriptions.whatIs: Crop images with free selection, preset aspect ratios (1:1, 16:9, 4:3, etc.), or exact pixel dimensions directly in your browser. No data is uploaded to any server — all processing uses the HTML5 Canvas API.
descriptions.step1Text: Drag and drop an image onto the drop zone, or click to browse. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and SVG input.
descriptions.step2Text: Draw a selection rectangle on the image. Choose Free crop, a preset aspect ratio, or enter exact pixel dimensions.
descriptions.step3Text: Preview the cropped image and download it. The output format matches the input format.
descriptions.p1: Crop images with free selection, preset aspect ratios, or exact dimensions. Resize images with [Image Resizer](/image-resize), compress with [Image Compressor](/image-compress), or convert formats with [Image Converter](/image-convert).
descriptions.p2: Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP output. Images in GIF, BMP, SVG, or AVIF format are automatically converted to PNG.
descriptions.faq1Q: What image formats can I crop?
descriptions.faq1A: You can crop PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, SVG, and AVIF images. The output format matches the input format. Unsupported output formats (GIF, BMP, SVG, AVIF) are saved as PNG.
descriptions.faq2Q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
descriptions.faq2A: No. All image processing happens in your browser using the Canvas API. Your images never leave your device.
descriptions.faq3Q: Can I crop to a specific aspect ratio?
descriptions.faq3A: Yes. Use the Preset mode to select from common aspect ratios (1:1, 16:9, 4:3, etc.) or use Exact mode to enter specific pixel dimensions.
